title: New Feature: Create Subitems from Calendar View
excerpt: Currently, you can create an item by clicking on a day in the calendar view (or using button), but it would be very useful to be able to create subitems directly in the calendar rather than switching back and forth betwe…

posts.author: RWM (Cliff)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, you can create an item by clicking on a day in the calendar view (or using button), but it would be very useful to be able to create subitems directly in the calendar rather than switching back and forth between calendar and table.

posts.author: hkjohn (jawn)
posts.cookedHtml: I would really like this for the Timeline view, especially since there’s no shortcut to quickly switch between the Table and Calendar/Timeline views and CTRL+B is only useful for switching between boards.

posts.author: Ksuyak (Kirsten Suyak)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this! We are forced to use Google Calendar because we cannot assign subitems directly in the Monday Calendar view.

posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @RWM @Ksuyak @hkjohn, I would like to share our calendar app, MasterPlan Calendar. It offers a real customizable calendar where you can create items and subitems directly from the calendar view. For users working with multiple boards on a dashboard, items/subitems can also be created from there.
